name: Voltage-Gated Channels
short_description: Ion channels whose opening probability depends on membrane voltage.
detailed_description: Voltage-gated channels — principally sodium and potassium species in this project — shape action potential generation at the soma and, when present in dendrites, shape local dendritic processing. The project optimises combinations of Na and K voltage-gated conductances to match a target angle-to-AP-frequency relationship.
